scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@palms/shared && npm run build --workspace=@palms/public-app --if-present && npm run build --workspace=@palms/admin-app --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@palms/shared && npm run test --workspace=@palms/public-app --if-present && npm run test --workspace=@palms/admin-app --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@palms/shared && npm run lint --workspace=@palms/public-app --if-present && npm run lint --workspace=@palms/admin-app --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@palms/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@palms/public-app --if-present && npm run typecheck --workspace=@palms/admin-app --if-present
